## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run --json`

## Loop Safety Checklist

- [ ] The change has a clear objective and stop condition.
- [ ] Code-changing work stayed inside the intended branch or worktree.
- [ ] New write-capable automation is gated by durable human approval.
- [ ] User-facing docs or examples were updated when behavior changed.
